package rulecoverage

func PositiveSsrfViaUserControlledUrl() string {
    ruleID := "ssrf_via_user_controlled_url"
    family := "security"
    severity := "error"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "`http.Get(userInput)` or `http.NewRequest(\"GET\", userInput, nil)` where the URL comes from request parameters"
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
